themes.reasoning_notes: Gets flying only if you control an artifact, making it a clear artifact-reward creature for artifact decks.
Conditional evasion helps apply pressure efficiently, but the card mainly belongs in artifact shells rather than dedicated tempo plans.
Conditional flying turns artifact presence into a meaningful combat reward, so it fits artifact decks as a modest payoff creature.
Its only extra functionality is gaining flying, making evasive pressure a real but clearly secondary theme.
